title: Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Bihar

overview.short: Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in Kaimur District and Rohtas District of Bihar.
overview.description: Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in Kaimur District and Rohtas District of Bihar. It is the largest sanctuary in the state and extended in area of 1,504.96 km2 (581.07 sq mi) in plateaued landscape of Kaimur Range. It was established in 1979. The major forest types are Tropical Dry Mixed Deciduous, Dry Sal Forests, Boswellia Forests and Dry Bamboo Brakes.

topPlaces.name: Chainpur, Kaimur
topPlaces.description: Chainpur is a village and corresponding community development block in Kaimur district of Bihar, India. It is located 11 km west of the district headquarters of Bhabua.

topPlaces.name: Tomb of Bakhtiyar Khan
topPlaces.description: The Tomb of Bakhtiyar Khan is a tomb located in the Kaimur district of the Indian state of Bihar. It is a monument of national importance.

topPlaces.name: Kurasan
topPlaces.description: Kurasan is a village in Bhabua block of Kaimur district, Bihar, India. As of 2011, its population was 3,609, in 606 households.

topPlaces.name: Betri
topPlaces.description: Betri is a village in Bhabua block of Kaimur district, Bihar, India. As of 2011, its population was 4,377, in 811 households.

topPlaces.description: Mokari is a large village in Bhabua block of Kaimur district, Bihar, India. As of 2011, its population was 8,398, in 1,458 households.

topPlaces.name: Datiawan
topPlaces.description: Datiyawan (दतियाँव) is a village in Bhabua block of Kaimur district, Bihar, India. As of 2011, its population was 2,702, in 485 households.

topPlaces.name: Sarangpur, Kaimur

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (78 km) and the nearest railway station is Varanasi Junction (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chainpur, Kaimur, Tomb of Bakhtiyar Khan, Kurasan, Betri, Mokri, India.
